description: This file defines a singly linked list implementation with methods to add, remove, retrieve size, and access elements by index. It includes a nested Node class and utility methods.

classes.name: LinkedList
classes.description: A singly linked list class with basic list operations.

classes.name: Node
classes.description: A nested class representing a node in the linked list.

methods.name: add
methods.description: Adds an element to the end of the linked list.

methods.name: remove
methods.description: Removes the first occurrence of an element from the list.

methods.name: size
methods.description: Returns the number of elements in the list.

methods.name: get
methods.description: Retrieves the element at the specified index.

methods.name: unlink
methods.description: Removes a node from the list by adjusting pointers.

methods.name: tail
methods.description: Utility function to find the last node in the list.
